flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Virginia Union University are 28% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($38.3k vs $53.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Virginia Union University rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.5k → $17.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Virginia Union University rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.5k → $17.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia Union University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (41.8% → 34.2%).
